content: Ondolemar: That fool Jarl Igmund continues to tolerate Talos worship under his nose. His weakness disgusts me. Thalmor Soldier: He lets his guards fuck the Temples of Talos whores in broad daylight. Pathetic. Though I wouldn’t mind seeing one of those big Nord cunts on her knees before me. Ondolemar: Focus, soldier. We are here to eradicate heresy, not indulge in barbarian pleasures. Though I won’t deny… their defiance makes breaking them more satisfying. Thalmor Soldier: Is that why you let them grope you at the last embassy party, sir? Saw that milk-drinker Legate smirk when you bent over the refreshments. Ondolemar: were the one dripping mead down your thighs for half the room to see. Discipline, or I’ll have you scrubbing draugr dust from your worthless armor with your tongue. Thalmor Soldier: Hah! You begged me to taste you like a Breton whore after the executions in Solitude. Or should I remind the other justiciars? Ondolemar: Silence, before I remind which one of us gutted that Stormcloak bitch screaming about Talos last week. Her blood look exquisite on your boots. Thalmor Soldier: Fuck yes it did. Still better than your bed skills.
Thalmor Soldier: Pfft, like you'd waste time in bed when you could be ranting about Elven superiority. I'll stick to my war axe and real conquests. Ondolemar: conquests
